subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-03-13
subcodes.first_line: Woe unto the world because of offenses, for it must needs be that offenses come; but woe to that man by whom the offense cometh.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @universal peace; world unity, @unity in diversity, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity
